description: Flexible layout container primitive. Use for cards, content wrappers, info panels, and any block that needs configurable padding, background, border radius, border, or box shadow. Zero JavaScript required.

data-box.agent_hint: Activates the box container. Bare attribute, no value needed.

data-padding.agent_hint: Internal padding. xs=4px, sm=8px, md=16px, lg=24px, xl=36px.

data-bg.agent_hint: Background fill. Use raised for card-like containers, gradient for hero/CTA blocks, semantic colors for status areas.

data-radius.agent_hint: Border corner rounding. none=square, sm/md=standard card, lg=large panel, full=pill shape.

data-shadow.agent_hint: Box shadow depth. sm=subtle lift, md=standard depth, lg=floating card effect.

data-border.agent_hint: Adds a 1px solid border using the --ix-border color token. Bare attribute.

content.agent_hint: Any content that should be contained within the box. Use data-stack inside for layout.

do: Combine data-bg=raised with data-shadow=sm and data-border for a standard card
Use data-bg=gradient for CTA or hero highlight boxes
Use data-bg=danger/success/warning for alert or status indicator panels
Use data-stack or data-flex inside for inner layout
Use data-radius=lg for prominent panel containers
dont: Do not set background-color or padding via inline styles
Do not nest data-box inside data-box without purpose — use data-card or data-stack instead
Do not use data-radius=full for non-pill shapes

examples.label: Standard raised card
examples.emmet: div[data-box data-padding=md data-bg=raised data-shadow=sm data-radius=md data-border]>strong{Card Title}+p{Description here}
examples.html:
Card Title

Description here

examples.label: Gradient CTA block
examples.emmet: div[data-box data-padding=lg data-bg=gradient data-radius=lg]>h2{Get Started Today}+button[data-intent=primary]{Sign Up Free}
examples.html: Get Started Today

examples.label: Success status panel
examples.emmet: div[data-box data-padding=sm data-bg=success data-radius=sm]>strong{Payment Complete}+p{Your transaction was successful.}
examples.html:
Payment Complete

Your transaction was successful.

examples.label: Danger alert box
examples.emmet: div[data-box data-padding=sm data-bg=danger data-radius=sm data-border]>strong{Error}+p{Something went wrong. Please try again.}
examples.html:
Error

Something went wrong. Please try again.
